name: Moorland Road Golf Center
address: 5900 S Moorland Rd, New Berlin, WI 53151
about: Moorland Road Golf Center is a multi-faceted golf facility offering indoor and outdoor year-round activities. The venue features a driving range with grass and mat areas, heated bays, and a short game practice area, alongside an 18-hole Stonewater mini golf course. The core offering is a state-of-the-art golf simulator area providing an immersive entertainment and practice experience for golfers of all skill levels. The facility also includes an online pro shop for accessories, gift certificates, and equipment, as well as an on-site Dairy Bar serving a selection of Wisconsin-made food and beverages, including Cedar Crest Ice Cream and Sprecher Root Beer. Private golf instruction is available with PGA Professionals and Golf Coaches for players of all ages and abilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round heated driving range with both grass and mat hitting surfaces
Dedicated simulator space with a variety of courses and game modes for practice and fun
Supportive learning environment with personalized instruction from PGA Professionals

food_and_drink.notes: On-site Dairy Bar serving food options, including Cedar Crest Ice Cream and Johnsonville Bratwurst
Full bar with a wide range of Wisconsin beers, including Sprecher Root Beer and Spotted Cow Beer

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is not explicitly stated, but as a golf facility, it is highly recommended that you bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site Dairy Bar with food and drinks, including a selection of local Wisconsin products. It does not specify if outside food or drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time for completing 18 holes on a simulator, as it depends on the game mode and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Moorland Road Golf Center is very kid-friendly, featuring a signature Stonewater mini golf course and offering junior golf lessons and clinics.
